_comment: REGIME 3: REACTING FLOW — Fill measured values from TNF Workshop or similar turbulent flame datasets

provenance.doi: N/A (workshop dataset documentation; original experimental papers not linked in template extraction)

operating_bounds.notes: Flame D nominal conditions per SandiaPilotDoc21. Species values are pilot-stream mass fractions converted to mole fractions.

metrics.notes: Converted from reported mass fractions using molecular weights.

dataset.description: Boundary-condition/species composition values for Sandia piloted CH4/air Flame D from TNF Workshop documentation (Doc21). Provides pilot stream temperature and composition, and jet bulk velocity.
dataset.fuel: CH4/air jet with piloted hot products (Flame D)
